title: Israeli Minister Threatens to Evict Palestinians From West Bank Hamlet
summary_full: Bezalel Smotrich, the hard-line minister, said he was retaliating for the International Criminal Court prosecutor seeking his arrest, something the court did not confirm nor deny.
summary_public: Bezalel Smotrich, the hard-line minister, said he was retaliating for the International Criminal Court prosecutor seeking his arrest, something the court did not confirm nor deny.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Threatens to Evict Palestinians From West Bank
